home.hero_subtitle: We are committed to protecting your data. Explore our privacy philosophies across all project ecosystems.
home.philosophy_text: Privacy is not a feature, it's a fundamental right. In every project, from browser extensions to web apps, we always adhere to the principle: Your data belongs to you.
home.security_text: End-to-end encryption and local storage are top priorities.
home.transparency_text: No hidden data collection, no selling of user information.

projects.title: PROJECT LIST
projects.subtitle: Every tool is a promise of safety.

bookmark_manager.name: Pracy Bookmark
bookmark_manager.desc: A sleek and intuitive Chrome extension to manage bookmarks with search, sort, folder management, and export/import features.

coming_soon.name: Coming Soon
coming_soon.desc: New projects are being developed with the same privacy-first philosophy.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.internal_desc: All bookmark operations are performed locally in your browser. No personal data is collected.
privacy.storage_desc: Used to save user preferences (themes, fonts, etc.) locally.
privacy.bookmarks_desc: Used only to display, organize, search, and edit bookmarks locally.
privacy.usage_desc: We do not sell, trade, or transfer your information to outside parties. All data remains within your browser ecosystem.
privacy.source_desc: The extension is open-source. You can review the code and releases on GitHub.
privacy.issues_desc: Minor UI refresh issues after moving items. Fix: Refresh page (F5).
privacy.contact_desc: If you have any questions or concerns, please contact at:
